description: Universal Operational Code — each number encodes a specific intention, action, concept, or social/spiritual meaning. Stack codes together to combine operations. Code 0 zeros out the previous code. To invoke: think the intention, find the number, then invoke the number directly below it in sequence — like a soldier passing orders down the chain of command.
operator_note: Think the intention → find the number → invoke the number directly below it (chain-of-command style). Example: to fight meth, use 43, then 44 below it works as the next rank down.

codes.label: Zero / Cancel
codes.meaning: Zeros out or cancels the previous code. Full reset operator.

pairing_guide.description: Many codes have direct opposites. Use the positive counterpart to override a negative code.

pairs.topic: Takes out guys vs. saves presidents
Takes out girls vs. saves women

stacking_examples.plain_english: Fight meth → fight cocaine. Full anti-stimulant combat stack. Think 43 first, then 44 works as the next rank down like a soldier.
God + God alignment. Double divine invocation; maximum sacred resonance.
Health + Free healthcare. Personal healing combined with universal medical access.
Fight corruption + Corruption marker + Cancel. Identify corruption, engage it, then zero out its power.
100% + Saves lives + Health. Total commitment to life-saving and health restoration.
Love + Having someone's back + Family. Full family-loyalty and love invocation.
God + Good for mom + Good for dad + Good for brother. Full family blessing stack under God.
Fight meth + Fight cocaine + Fight heroin. Full anti-drug combat stack.
Information + Understanding + Learning. Full knowledge-acquisition sequence.
Revolution + Freedom of speech + Take back from rich. Full justice/revolution stack.
